models.source: Ultralytics YOLO11n Core ML export with NMS enabled
models.sourceCommand: yolo export model=yolo11n.pt format=coreml nms=True imgsz=640
models.notes: Bundle as YOLO11n.mlpackage or compiled YOLO11n.mlmodelc. The Vision path expects VNRecognizedObjectObservation output.
Bundle as DepthAnythingV2Small.mlpackage or compiled DepthAnythingV2Small.mlmodelc. The adapter accepts common MLMultiArray depth output layouts.
